checklist_tip: The checklist on the main screen updates as you go.

welcome.intro: Video to Text turns video, audio, and links into text files. A short setup walks you through tools, transcription, and the queue.

output.intro: Choose where .txt transcripts are saved. Documents is the default and matches the checklist when selected.
output.error_pick_folder: Pick a folder with Browse, or use Use Documents (recommended).
output.tip_documents_set: Using your Documents folder — this will show as ready in "Before you start".
output.tip_custom_set: Custom folder — it will show as set once you continue.
output.tip_use_documents: Tip: Use Documents unless you need another location.

tools.intro: URL downloads need ffmpeg and yt-dlp on this computer.
tools.install_success: All set. ffmpeg and yt-dlp are installed; paths were saved. The checklist above should show them as found.
tools.tip_manual: Or install manually and set paths later in Settings.
tools.linux_hint: On Linux install ffmpeg and yt-dlp with your package manager, then set paths in Settings.
tools.js_runtimes_tip: If YouTube fails with "no supported JavaScript runtime", install Deno or Node and set this to the runtime name yt-dlp expects (often deno).
tools.deno_success: Done. Deno installed; JS runtimes set to deno.

cookies_options.auto: Auto (Edge on Windows, Chrome on macOS, Firefox on Linux)

tools.cookies_tip: yt-dlp reads cookies from your browser so age-restricted or login-required videos work. Make sure you're logged in to YouTube / TikTok in that browser. Firefox is strongly recommended on Windows — Chrome, Brave and Edge use app-bound cookie encryption (Chrome 127+) that yt-dlp cannot decrypt, even when the browser is closed.

mode.cloud: Cloud (HTTP API) — OpenAI-compatible /audio/transcriptions, needs an API key.
mode.local: Local Whisper — whisper.cpp on this PC, no API key; download a model on the next step.
mode.browser: In-app Whisper — runs in the app (WASM), no API key and no whisper-cli; model downloads on first use.
mode.later: Decide in Settings later — skip API/model setup for now.

browser_step.intro: In-app Whisper uses Transformers.js in the app. You still need ffmpeg / yt-dlp for links; transcription itself stays on-device in the webview.
browser_step.tip: Labels match the local catalog; ggml .bin files are not used in this mode.

cloud_step.intro: Enter your cloud provider details. The key is stored in the OS secure store, not in plain text.
cloud_step.error_no_key: Enter your API key to continue (or go back and choose another option).

local_step.intro: Local Whisper is separate from ffmpeg above. The app can download the ggml model for you. For whisper-cli: Windows — official whisper-bin-x64.zip from ggml-org/whisper.cpp (use the button below; includes DLLs). macOS — no CLI zip; the button searches PATH and Homebrew layouts, or use Pick file… after brew install whisper-cpp. Linux — install via your distro or build from source (see below); then set the path or use Pick file…. You can also put whisper-cli next to the app.
local_step.step_a_tip: Optional path if the binary is not next to v2t. Use the setup button (Windows/macOS) or Pick file… for whisper-cli.exe / whisper-cli.
local_step.cuda_intro: NVIDIA GPU found ({{name}}). The CUDA build runs Whisper 10-20× faster than CPU. We will download the cuBLAS bundle by default — change this in Settings → Whisper acceleration if needed.
local_step.linux_intro: Linux: there is no download button here. Examples:
local_step.linux_li_ubuntu: Ubuntu/Debian: sudo apt install whisper-cpp or build whisper.cpp
local_step.cli_success: whisper-cli path saved. The checklist should update; continue with the model below.
local_step.cli_path_placeholder: Leave empty if whisper-cli sits next to the app
local_step.step_b_tip: Choose size, then download. We verify SHA-1; when it matches, you will see a green confirmation below and the checklist item Whisper model (.bin) turns green.
local_step.model_success: Model ready. File is on disk and SHA-1 matches. The checklist should show a green dot for Whisper model (.bin).

later_step.intro: You can switch between HTTP API, Local Whisper, and In-app Whisper, set API keys, and download models anytime in Settings.

run_step.intro: Add files, folders, or paste links into the queue, then press Start queue.
run_step.tip: If something fails, check the log at the bottom and the checklist above.
